data.title: Serstech receives 4.3 MSEK order from India
data.description: Today, Serstech secured a significant order of 4.3 million Swedish Krona (MSEK) from Kapri Corp, their partner based in India. The order encompasses the Serstech Arx mkII device along with its associated software. Delivery and invoicing for this order are scheduled for the second quarter of 2026.

data.title: STARCOMPLIANCE UNVEILS NEW WAVE OF INNOVATION AHEAD OF SYNERGY '26
data.description: StarCompliance (Star), a top provider of employee and firm compliance technology, has unveiled a series of new product advancements in Rockville, Maryland, on April 14, 2026. This launch aims to enhance connected compliance, data visibility, and employee experience. The company is introducing cutting-edge capabilities to improve services for its clientele.

data.title: Senhwa Biosciences Secures Strategic Backing from Global Investor GEM with Up to NT$500 Million to Accelerate AI-Driven Drug Development
data.description: Today, in Taipei and San Diego, Senhwa Biosciences, Inc. (TPEx: 6492), a company in the clinical-stage biopharmaceutical sector, revealed a recent development. The company has officially signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with GEM YIELD BAHAMAS LIMITED, an affiliate of the esteemed global investment firm Global.

data.title: LYCRA® VintageFX Fiber Officially Launches at Kingpins Amsterdam
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, a new product called LYCRA® VintageFX fiber was introduced at Kingpins Amsterdam. This fiber combines traditional vintage denim looks with contemporary stretch, comfort, and shape retention. The launch event showcased the innovative features of the fiber to industry professionals and enthusiasts. This new offering is expected to revolutionize the denim market by providing a unique blend of authenticity and performance.

data.title: Beyond by RS2 and Hakisa Partner to Launch Digital Expense Management Solution for the Social and Public Sector
data.description: In a recent development, Beyond by RS2 has collaborated with Hakisa GmbH to introduce a new integrated expense management solution that utilizes cards. The partnership between the two companies promises to streamline the management of expenses for businesses. This collaboration is set to revolutionize expense management, combining the expertise of Beyond by RS2 and Hakisa GmbH. The joint effort aims to provide businesses with a more efficient and user-friendly way to handle expenses through a card-based system. The impact of this partnership is expected to significantly benefit businesses looking to optimize their expense management processes.

data.title: Owl Labs' Meeting Owl 5 Pro Earns Microsoft Teams Certification, Completing Fully Certified Portfolio
data.description: In London, Owl Labs unveiled its new device, the Meeting Owl 5 Pro, which has obtained Microsoft Teams certification. The Meeting Owl 5 Pro is equipped with 360-degree AI-powered video conferencing technology, emphasizing flexibility to accommodate diverse room setups, such as certified peripherals and full room systems with approved partner solutions. This achievement aligns the Meeting Owl 5 Pro with the Meeting Owl 4, showcasing its adaptability for various collaboration needs.
